query:
-- Step 1: Get the current ai_assessment id for the Isuzu claim
SELECT id, claim_id, fraud_risk_score, fraud_risk_level, fraud_indicators_json
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE claim_id = 2730001
LIMIT 1;
